word: H2679 - חֲצִי הַמְּנֻחֹות - Chătsîy ham-Mᵉnuchôwth - chat-tsee' hammen-oo-khoth' - Half of the Manahethites

sections.paragraph:
Original: חצי המּנחות

Transliteration: chătsı̂y hamnûchôth

Phonetic: chat-tsee' ham-men-oo-khoth'

BDB Definition:

(half of the) Manahethites = see Manaheth " resting place"
  1. half of the Manassites; also spelled like 2680

Origin: from H2677 and the plural of H4496, with the article interposed

TWOT entry:

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
